headline: Citigroup Downgrades C.H. Robinson Worldwide to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $199
summary: Citigroup  analyst Ariel Rosa   downgrades C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) from Buy to Neutral and maintains the price target from $199 to $199.

raw.headline: Citigroup Downgrades C.H. Robinson Worldwide to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $199

headline: Citi turns cautious on trucking stocks as valuation concerns outweigh earnings ups
summary: Investing.com -- Citi has adopted a more cautious stance on North American trucking stocks, arguing that strong freight fundamentals and rising earnings expectations are already largely reflected in share prices after a sharp rally across the sector in 2026.
